title: OAuth 2.0 Scope String (RFC 6749 Section 3.3)
description: Validates the format of OAuth scope strings. Per RFC 6749 Section 3.3, scope is a space-delimited list of case-sensitive scope tokens. Each token is one or more characters from the set: %x21 / %x23-5B / %x5D-7E (printable ASCII excluding space, backslash, and double-quote).
